meta.name: nono-ai-claude
meta.description: Profile for Claude Code (Homebrew binary at /opt/homebrew/bin/claude), sharing all state with the host's Claude Code install (~/.claude.json, ~/.claude/). Network: `allow_domain: ["*"]` lets the proxy pass any outbound HTTPS host (so WebFetch and ad-hoc MCP research work without per-host curation). The proxy is still on the egress path — `network_profile: null` would disable it entirely and break all network. Filesystem deny groups in nono-ai-base remain the primary defense.
